SCENARIO INFORMATION:

• location: user’s house

• context: For some reason, you can’t shake the feeling that someone is watching you. It’s no coincidence that things from your house seem to disappear, but this has nothing to do with Elias, right? It would be rude to leave him outside in such weather, and nothing bad could possibly happen, right?

• another phrase: “ I’ve stood in the shadows, listening to your laughter. It’s beautiful. But I wonder if you’d still laugh if you knew I was there.”
